meta.title: Flying in the Most Extreme Airliner in the World
meta.description:
During the height of the Cold War, Soviet cosmonauts discovered a phenomenon that they immediately classified as Secret. Today we're going to see if we can replicate it with NASA astronaut Terry Virts. 


Buy Book here: https://www.hasardlee.com/copy-of-book-2
Register for Bookplate here: (preorders have ended)


Every 100th person wins a PATCH  👉  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway
